contents: Require Import Category.Sum Functor.Core Functor.Composition.Core Functor.Identity.

(** We save [inl] and [inr] so we can use them to refer to the functors, too.  Outside of the [Categories/] directory, they should always be referred to as [Functor.inl] and [Functor.inr], after a [Require Functor].  Outside of this file, but in the [Categories/] directory, if you do not want to depend on all of [Functor] (for e.g., speed reasons), they should be referred to as [Functor.Sum.inl] and [Functor.Sum.inr] after a [Require Functor.Sum]. *)
(** ** Injections [inl : C → C + D] and [inr : D → C + D] *)

Definition inl : Functor C (C + D)
    := Build_Functor C (C + D)
                     (@inl _ _)
                     (fun _ _ m => m)
                     (fun _ _ _ _ _ => idpath)
                     (fun _ => idpath).

Definition inr : Functor D (C + D)
    := Build_Functor D (C + D)
                     (@inr _ _)
                     (fun _ _ m => m)
                     (fun _ _ _ _ _ => idpath)
                     (fun _ => idpath).
(** ** Coproduct of functors [F + F' : C + C' → D] *)

Definition sum (F : Functor C D) (F' : Functor C' D)
  : Functor (C + C') D.

refine (Build_Functor
              (C + C') D
              (fun cc'
               => match cc' with
                    | type_inl c => F c
                    | type_inr c' => F' c'
                  end)
              (fun s d
               => match s, d with
                    | type_inl cs, type_inl cd
                      => fun m : morphism _ cs cd => F _1 m
                    | type_inr c's, type_inr c'd
                      => fun m : morphism _ c's c'd => F' _1 m
                    | _, _ => fun m => match m with end
                  end%morphism)
              _
              _);
    abstract (
        repeat (intros [] || intro);
        simpl in *;
          auto with functor
      ).

Definition swap C D
  : Functor (C + D) (D + C)
    := sum (inr _ _) (inl _ _).

Definition swap_involutive_helper {C D} c
  : (swap C D) ((swap D C) c)
    = c
    := match c with type_inl _ => idpath | type_inr _ => idpath end.

Lemma swap_involutive `{Funext} C D
  : swap C D o swap D C = 1.

goals.conclusion: swap C D o swap D C = 1
swap C D o swap D C = 1

{HO
: (fun c : D + C =>
   match
     match c with
     | type_inl _ _ c0 => type_inr c0
     | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
     end
   with
   | type_inl _ _ c0 => type_inr c0
   | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
   end) =
  idmap
&
transport
  (fun GO : D + C -> D + C =>
   forall s d : D + C,
   match s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end ->
   match GO s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end)
  HO
  (fun (s d : D + C)
     (m : match s with
          | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
              | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
              end
          | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
              | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
              end
          end) =>
   match
     match s with
     | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
     | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
     end as s0
     return
       (match s0 with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            end
        end ->
        match
          match s0 with
          | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
          | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
          end
        with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            end
        end)
   with
   | type_inl _ _ cs =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
       | type_inr _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       end
   | type_inr _ _ c's =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
       end
   end
     (match
        s as s0
        return
          (match s0 with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               end
           end ->
           match
             match s0 with
             | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
             | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
             end
           with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               end
           end)
      with
      | type_inl _ _ cs =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
          | type_inr _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          end
      | type_inr _ _ c's =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
          end
      end m)) =
(fun s d : D + C => idmap)}

transport
  (fun GO : D + C -> D + C =>
   forall s d : D + C,
   match s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end ->
   match GO s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end)
  (path_forall
     (fun c : (D + C)%category => ((swap C D) _0 ((swap D C) _0 c))%object)
     idmap swap_involutive_helper)
  (fun (s d : D + C)
     (m : match s with
          | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
              | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
              end
          | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
              | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
              end
          end) =>
   match
     match s with
     | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
     | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
     end as s0
     return
       (match s0 with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            end
        end ->
        match
          match s0 with
          | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
          | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
          end
        with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            end
        end)
   with
   | type_inl _ _ cs =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
       | type_inr _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       end
   | type_inr _ _ c's =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
       end
   end
     (match
        s as s0
        return
          (match s0 with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               end
           end ->
           match
             match s0 with
             | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
             | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
             end
           with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               end
           end)
      with
      | type_inl _ _ cs =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
          | type_inr _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          end
      | type_inr _ _ c's =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
          end
      end m)) =
(fun s d : D + C => idmap)

transport
  (fun GO : D + C -> D + C =>
   forall s d : D + C,
   match s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end ->
   match GO s with
   | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
       | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
       end
   | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
       match GO d with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
       | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
       end
   end)
  (path_forall
     (fun c : (D + C)%category => ((swap C D) _0 ((swap D C) _0 c))%object)
     idmap swap_involutive_helper)
  (fun (s d : D + C)
     (m : match s with
          | type_inl _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s0 d0
              | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
              end
          | type_inr _ _ s0 =>
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
              | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s0 d0
              end
          end) =>
   match
     match s with
     | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
     | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
     end as s0
     return
       (match s0 with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match d with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            end
        end ->
        match
          match s0 with
          | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
          | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
          end
        with
        | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end
        | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
            match
              match
                match d with
                | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                end
              with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
            end
        end)
   with
   | type_inl _ _ cs =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C cs d1
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
       | type_inr _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       end
   | type_inr _ _ c's =>
       match
         match d with
         | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
         | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
         end as d0
         return
           (match d0 with
            | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
            | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            end ->
            match
              match d0 with
              | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
              | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
              end
            with
            | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D c's d1
            | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
            end)
       with
       | type_inl _ _ _ => fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                             end
       | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
       end
   end
     (match
        s as s0
        return
          (match s0 with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match d with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               end
           end ->
           match
             match s0 with
             | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
             | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
             end
           with
           | type_inl _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d0 => morphism C s1 d0
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end
           | type_inr _ _ s1 =>
               match
                 match d with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d0 => morphism D s1 d0
               end
           end)
      with
      | type_inl _ _ cs =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism D cs d1
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ cd => idmap
          | type_inr _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          end
      | type_inr _ _ c's =>
          match
            d as d0
            return
              (match d0 with
               | type_inl _ _ _ => Empty
               | type_inr _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               end ->
               match
                 match d0 with
                 | type_inl _ _ c => type_inr c
                 | type_inr _ _ c' => type_inl c'
                 end
               with
               | type_inl _ _ d1 => morphism C c's d1
               | type_inr _ _ _ => Empty
               end)
          with
          | type_inl _ _ _ =>
              fun m0 : Empty => match m0 return Empty with
                                end
          | type_inr _ _ c'd => idmap
          end
      end m))
  x x0 x1 =
x1

contents:
repeat match goal with
               | [ |- context[transport (fun x' => forall y, @?C x' y) ?p ?f ?x] ]
                 => simpl rewrite (@transport_forall_constant _ _ C _ _ p f x)
           end.

   end

contents:
by repeat match goal with
                  | [ H : Empty |- _ ] => destruct H
                  | [ H : (_ + _) |- _ ] => destruct H
                  | _ => progress hnf in *
                end.
